title: IESET Publisher Registry
description: Single source of truth for every data publisher the framework uses. Hypothesis YAMLs reference publishers by id; derive_coverage.py intersects the two to produce the coverage map. The id is the namespace for `variables[].source` strings in hypothesis specs.

publishers.description: Map from publisher id (snake_case) to publisher record.

endpoint.description: Base API URL or catalogue page. Empty for publishers that require per-series construction.

auth_env_var.description: Environment variable the fetcher reads for credentials (e.g. FRED_API_KEY).

credibility_tier.description: 1=publisher-authoritative central bank / NSO, 2=curated aggregator, 3=academic authoritative, 4=institutional index, 5=constructed composite.

status.description: ready=fetcher module implemented and working. pending=entry registered, fetcher not yet built. scrape_needed=no API, HTML/PDF extraction required. reconstruct_needed=compose from 2+ sources. gap=no source meets provenance requirements.

fetcher_module.description: Python import path of the fetcher module (e.g. 'data.fetchers.world_bank_wdi'). Required when status=ready.

catalogue_url.description: Publisher's series catalogue for verify: true checks.

aliases.description: Alternate ids accepted in hypothesis source strings (e.g. 'wb' for 'world_bank_wdi'). derive_coverage.py canonicalises on read.
